description_long: This is a classic telephone booth with a rectangular, upright structure, predominantly white with green accents. The booth features a flat white roof bordered by a green band, above which the word 'Telefón' is displayed in black on a white background, framed by green panels. The front and sides are fitted with large, grid-patterned glass windows, allowing visibility into the interior. The lower section of the booth displays a white panel with the letters 'P T' in black, set within a green frame. The booth appears to be constructed mainly from metal and glass, with a sturdy, enclosed design typical of public telephone booths found in urban environments. The door is integrated into the front face, with a handle visible, and the overall appearance is clean and well-maintained.
description: A white and green telephone booth with grid-patterned glass windows, 'Telefón' signage, and a sturdy, enclosed design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Telefón' sign, grid glass door, and 'P T' panel at the base.
description_view_1: Side view with grid-patterned glass panels and green framing, no signage visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with grid glass panels and green trim.
description_view_3: Rear view with grid glass panels and green framing, no signage, door handle visible.
attribute_window_configuration: grid-patterned glass panels on all sides
attribute_signage_or_labeling: 'Telefón' sign in black on white above the door, 'P T' panel at the base
